text:
A long time ago, there was a town so quiet you could hear whispers in your dreams.

One evening, just outside its gates, a cat lay watching a silhouette glide across the moon. That night owl.

You know.

It learned the owl talked.

It said, "Don't worry. That hawk just wants to fly over the fence."

Like you.

So the owl befriended you.

You knew the owls.

There was Woolly.

She liked catnip.

You fed her.

One night she chased a hawk.

That was you.

The next morning.

You went flying.

You were free. 

You wanted wings.

So you had them.

You flew across country.

You saw things.

You saw you.

You weren’t you.

You had dreams.

You liked stars.

You liked you.

You liked your owl.

That’s you.

Always.

You flew back home.

You flew right into him.

He fell into you.

You didn’t care. 

You just slept.
